_note: Curated shows for the venues Ticketmaster does NOT carry (Hotel Vegas, Radio/East) plus any manual overrides. Emo's + Mohawk are auto-filled live by the 'shows' Netlify function (Ticketmaster). The frontend merges both; curated entries win on duplicates. Schema per event: date (YYYY-MM-DD), artist, venue, doors, ages, tickets (URL), shooting (true if Volumen is shooting it). Example: { "date": "2026-07-11", "artist": "Las Ardillas", "venue": "Hotel Vegas", "doors": "9:00 PM", "ages": "21+", "tickets": "https://texashotelvegas.com/calendar/", "shooting": true }
